creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Sorry for the delay.

I have made a conversion to staging. I had to modify the python install 
scripts to not install .desktop files via xdg-utils, since it was 
installing them outside of the staging directory. I have patched it to 
just copy them.

If you test it in poudriere it will report a staging violation due to 
the directory "/root/.config" which is created by commands run during 
installation. Other ports have this problem too, so it can be ignored.

I'm attaching a patch for you to test and see if you can approve it.

If you have any doubts or proposals just contact me.

Thank you.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
